title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a model applying diffusion-based image-generation techniques to text generation using uniform state diffusion. The architecture achieves over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs by shifting inference from memory-bound to compute-bound through bidirectional refinement passes over noise.
writeup: Better Stack covers DiffusionGemma, a Google DeepMind model that adapts diffusion techniques from image generation to text generation via uniform state diffusion. The architecture reaches over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs by replacing sequential decoding with bidirectional refinement passes over noise, shifting inference from memory-bound to compute-bound. The central takeaway is that diffusion-based text generation reframes the throughput bottleneck, treating generation as iterative denoising rather than token-by-token prediction.
